scenes.title: The Gate
scenes.prompt: Use only CSS shapes and gradients, no external images. A green rectangle as a gate slowly opens (splits into two halves moving apart). A golden glow appears behind it using a radial gradient. A small dark circle as a cat silhouette walks toward the gate from left.

scenes.title: The Garden
scenes.prompt: Use only CSS shapes and gradients, no external images. Colorful circles grow from small to large to represent flowers blooming. Use red, pink, purple, yellow circles appearing one by one. A small triangle shape moves from left to right as a butterfly.

scenes.title: The Wish
scenes.prompt: Use only CSS shapes and gradients, no external images. A tall brown rectangle as a tree trunk with a green circle on top as leaves. A golden star shape pulses at the top. Small yellow dots fall downward like sparkles using opacity animation.
scenes.narration: The ancient tree granted her a wish.
